title: Fusion Block Transitions
body:
![Banner](https://imgur.com/AXVg8dn.png)
### Fusion Block Transitions adds natural looking transitions between common blocks such as grass, sand, or mud.


![Separator](https://imgur.com/7JHHISr.png)
### Fusion Block Transitions requires  Fusion to work correctly. You can find Fusion by either clicking here or on the image below.


![Separator](https://imgur.com/qOtLw1R.png)
For future content, upcoming mods, and discussion, feel free to join the SuperMartijn642 discord server!
[](https://discord.gg/QEbGyUYB2e)

![Separator](https://imgur.com/cxdsdML.png)
